title: Design System: Roots Workbench Glass Console

headline.purpose: Equation Studio and Result workflow headings.

title.purpose: Method labels, panel headings, and compact section titles.

body.purpose: Short helper text, diagnostics, and classroom notes.

label.purpose: Field labels, toolbar text, tabs, and metadata.

mono.purpose: Expressions, tolerances, roots, and iteration values.

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus and active input selection.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, selected, and active state changes.

components.name: Primary Run Button
components.description: The solve action. Use for the active calculation command only.
components.css: .ds-btn-run { min-height: 36px; border: 1px solid rgba(30, 126, 85, 0.22); border-radius: 9px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #268b62, #176f4d); color: #fffdf8; padding: 0 20px; font: 650 0.86rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.28), 0 18px 32px -24px rgba(23,105,73,0.78); transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-run:hover { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #2d996d, #176c49); } .ds-btn-run:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f73d6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-run:active { transform: scale(0.99); }

components.name: Panel Action Button
components.description: Compact copy, export, and panel-level actions.
components.css: .ds-panel-action { display: grid; place-items: center; min-width: 40px; min-height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgba(70,64,54,0.12); border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.36); color: #171817; padding: 0 12px; font: 650 0.75rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1); } .ds-panel-action:hover { border-color: rgba(70,64,54,0.22); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.62); } .ds-panel-action:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f73d6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Expression Field
components.description: Primary formula entry with mono math styling and inline readiness status.
components.css: .ds-expression { width: 100%; min-height: 34px; border: 1px solid rgba(70,64,54,0.16); border-radius: 9px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.34); color: #171817; padding: 8px 72px 8px 12px; font: 520 0.92rem 'JetBrains Mono', Consolas, monospace; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.64); } .ds-expression:focus-visible { border-color: #2f73d6; outline: 2px solid #2f73d6; outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(47,115,214,0.14); }

components.name: Method Rail Item
components.description: One selectable root-finding method in the left rail.
components.css: .ds-method { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 38px minmax(0,1fr); align-items: center; min-height: 50px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: #171817; padding: 9px 12px; text-align: left; font: 650 0.96rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-method span { color: #171817; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', Consolas, monospace; } .ds-method:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.52); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.34); } .ds-method.active { border-color: rgba(30,126,85,0.1); background: rgba(30,126,85,0.14); color: #176c49; } .ds-method:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f73d6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Result Console
components.description: The primary answer surface for final root estimate, stopping status, and computation metadata.
components.css: .ds-result { display: grid; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.62); border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(255,253,248,0.48); color: #171817; padding: 18px; box-shadow: 0 22px 68px -42px rgba(52,44,34,0.62), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.74); } .ds-result p { margin: 0; font: 650 0.78rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-result strong { color: #176c49; font: 400 3rem 'JetBrains Mono', Consolas, monospace; } .ds-result small { color: #64645e; font: 560 0.8rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: Roots Workbench should feel like a polished Mac-style answer workstation for numerical analysis. The visual shell frames the app as a focused calculator desk: a dark desktop surround, a translucent work window, a compact method rail, and a Result Console that acts as the trusted answer surface.
keyCharacteristics: Mac-like glass workbench shell with a dark outer desk.
Light, warm calculator surfaces with restrained green and blue action states.
Compact toolbar and method rail for fast classroom repetition.
Large math display and root result as the primary visual anchors.
Tables and graphs treated as evidence surfaces, not decorative widgets.

rules.name: The Workbench Color Rule
rules.body: Green belongs to computation, blue belongs to utility, orange belongs to comparison, and red belongs to failure. Do not use these colors as decoration.

rules.name: The Glass Has A Job Rule
rules.body: Translucent material is allowed only on the shell, toolbars, major panels, and popovers. It must make layers easier to understand.

rules.name: The Numeric Evidence Rule
rules.body: Anything the user compares numerically must use mono, math typography, or tabular numerals.

rules.name: The Earned Material Rule
rules.body: Blur, shine, and shadow are reserved for structure and state. If a surface does not create hierarchy or feedback, keep it flat.

dos: Do make the shell feel like a focused Mac-style calculator desk.
Do use glass material on major layers when it clarifies hierarchy.
Do keep the Result Console visually dominant after a run.
Do use Computation Green for solving and convergence, and Utility Blue for focus and commands.
Do keep formulas, graph evidence, and iteration tables clearer than any atmospheric effect.
Do keep touch targets practical on mobile, even when desktop controls are compact.
donts: Don't make the interface look like a generic corporate dashboard.
Don't use purple-blue AI gradients, neon calculator skins, worksheet PDF styling, or plain wireframe styling.
Don't use glass blur as loose decoration. It must define shell, layer, or state.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as decorative accents.
Don't let traffic-light chrome, background gradients, or glass highlights compete with formulas or results.
